name: Oysters Bingo (Fried Oysters)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Flour (seasoned with salt and pepper)
recipeInstructions:
Oysters Bingo from the Ships Cabin Seafood Restaurant in Norfolk, Virginia
1. Lightly bread 6 oysters.
2. Sauté the oysters on one side until golden brown.
3. Remove the oysters and continue to sauté on the other side until the same color appears.
4. Turn off the heat.
5. Add wine, oyster juice, lemon juice, and shallots to the butter that the oysters were sautéd in.
6. This will create a creamy sauce to pour over the oysters.
